summary: Completed comprehensive testing of financial analysis platform. Backend APIs are structurally sound but yfinance data provider is completely non-functional. Frontend has Babel compilation issues in AssetCard component preventing UI rendering.

critical_bugs.issue: All yfinance requests failing with 'Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)' - Yahoo Finance API appears blocked or rate-limited
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all core functionality: price fetching, technical indicators, DCA scoring

ui_bugs.issue: Babel compilation error: 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'traverse')'
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents frontend from rendering, shows compilation error screen

compilation_status.runtime_rendering: ❌ Runtime compilation fails due to AssetCard.js

critical_priority: Fix yfinance connectivity issue - Yahoo Finance API is returning empty responses (HTTP 429 rate limiting detected)
Consider implementing alternative data provider (Alpha Vantage, Polygon, or mock data for testing)
Fix AssetCard.js Babel compilation error preventing frontend rendering
medium_priority: Test with working data provider once yfinance is fixed
Verify LLM integration works with valid data
